title: Interests
text:
Tidepools
In my free time, I enjoy going to the tidepools during low tide and seeing what I can find there.

title: About Me
text: I was raised in Oakland, CA, which is in the Bay Area, right across the bay from San Francisco. I grew up exploring the bay and California in general and fell in love with the area.

title: About Me
text: I was raised in Oakland, CA, which is in the Bay Area, right across the bay from San Francisco. I grew up exploring the bay and California in general and fell in love with the area.

title: About Me
text:
Career Goals
After my time ends at UCSB, I would like to enter the sphere of research. Ideally, I would like to become a PhD student studying wildfire and its ecological impacts. After taking a fire ecology class and beginning my work at the LEAF Lab, I have realized that is a signficant interest of mine that I would like to pursue as a career.

title: Sequoia Marx
text: I am a third year Environmental Studies major at the University of California, Santa Barbara. I am currently serving as the Garden Operations Coordinator for the Methodist Community Garden. I also work for the LEAF lab and the Aquatic Invertebrate Lab with the Cheadle Center.
